notes:

After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

notes:
◆ Feature Updates and Optimizations ◆
[Hide & Seek Party]
A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

notes:

Fog Valley: New Order
An unknown experiment, a valley shrouded in fog. Enemies and "friends," a bizarre liminality. In the heavy fog, you faintly hear something that sounds like... "Hello"...
A series of mysterious and bizarre phenomena have appeared in the Valley. Your job is to explore and uncover what's causing these eerie events!
Sanity
Your Sanity will decrease in certain areas and slowly recover outside of them.
As your Sanity drops, your vision and stamina will be affected.
